title: Senior Investment Banker at RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
